angle (hms dms hdms normangle angdist angdistx)

aggregate (gcount gfirst glast gmin gmax gsum gproduct gsumsqr gmean gvariance gstddev grms gany gall gntrue gnfalse ghist gaggr growid gmedian gfractile)
